TABLE.NAME: local_newupdate_indicator
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-course overrides for the new/updated activity indicator settings

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: The course this override applies to

FIELD.NAME: timespan
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: time-span in seconds (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: newenabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: whether the new indicator is shown (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: newlabel
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: label text for the new indicator (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: newicon
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: icon identifier for the new indicator (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: newcolour
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: colour style identifier for the new indicator (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: updatedenabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: whether the updated indicator is shown (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: updatedlabel
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: label text for the updated indicator (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: updatedicon
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: icon identifier for the updated indicator (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: updatedcolour
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: colour style identifier for the updated indicator (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: position
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: indicator position (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: showrecentlist
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: whether to show the recent content list (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: recentlistlimit
FIELD.COMMENT: Override: maximum items in the recent content list (null = use site default)

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Time the override was last modified
